description.ko: ECHO-0는 청각적 주파수를 매혹적인 시각적 풍경으로 변환하는 개념적 디지털 아트 설치물입니다. 실시간 데이터를 사용하여 소리의 물리적 본질을 나타내는 유동적이고 빛나는 패턴을 렌더링합니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is a conceptual digital art installation that transforms auditory frequencies into mesmerizing visual landscapes. It uses real-time data to render fluid, glowing patterns that represent the physical essence of sound.

prompt: A high-tech digital art installation called ECHO-0, featuring intricate sound visualization. Glowing cyan and magenta neon waveforms rippling through a dark, liquid-like surface. 3D geometric patterns reacting to audio frequencies. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, futuristic aesthetic.
